# Synthetic Fixtures

All fixture files in `tests/fixtures/` are **synthetic** -- they were hand-crafted
to exercise the parsers and adapters in barq-witness. They were not captured from
real tool sessions.

## hook-payloads/

Claude Code hook payload JSON files (PostToolUse schema). Used by integration
and compat tests to simulate events arriving from Claude Code hooks.

## session-logs/cursor/

Synthetic Cursor AI session export in the `cursorLog` JSON format expected by
`internal/adapters/cursor.ImportFromLog`. Contains representative `edit` and
`command` event types.

## session-logs/codex/

Synthetic OpenAI Codex session export in the `codexLog` JSON format expected by
`internal/adapters/codex.ImportFromLog`. Contains a session with edits.

## session-logs/aider/

Synthetic Aider chat history in the markdown format expected by
`internal/adapters/aider.ImportFromChat`. Includes an aider header, assistant
turns, and modified file markers.

## golden/

Golden output files for deterministic report text/markdown output checks.
Generated by the test suite on first run and committed to lock expected output.
